subparts.description: Initialize index.html frame layout with control panels and telemetry metrics cards.
subparts.verification_step: Open index.html in the browser and verify elements are present.

subparts.description: Establish CSS variable tokens for dark mode theme matching the design brief.
subparts.verification_step: Confirm styles render with no CSS parsing errors.

roadmap.verification_gate: HTML panels render with correct HSL layout colors and fit properly in the viewport.

subparts.description: Setup WebGLRenderer, camera, ambient/directional lights, and basic animation loop.
subparts.verification_step: Check browser console for successful WebGL context initialization.

subparts.description: Render a gray lunar terrain plane and a deep-blue solar panel with silver grid lines.
subparts.verification_step: Verify 3D solar panel and ground render correctly on screen.

roadmap.verification_gate: WebGL Canvas renders at 60 FPS with zero console warnings.

subparts.description: Create a procedural circle texture on HTML canvas and initialize 150 dust particles.
subparts.verification_step: Confirm particles are scattered randomly on the solar panel.

subparts.description: Implement Brownian random walk drift when EDS is inactive.
subparts.verification_step: Observe particles drift slowly without leaving panel bounds.

roadmap.verification_gate: 150+ particle sprites render cleanly on the panel surface.

subparts.description: Implement lateral velocity vectors pointing to nearest edges under traveling wave formulas.
subparts.verification_step: Click 'Activate EDS' and verify particles move toward the edges.

subparts.description: Deactivate particles crossing borders and update active particle indices.
subparts.verification_step: Check that particles disappear off the edge of the panel.

roadmap.verification_gate: Particles clear off the panel in accordance with voltage and phase modifiers, deactivating at boundaries.

subparts.description: Bind Voltage slider, Frequency slider, and Phase selection toggles to global physics states.
subparts.verification_step: Change slider values and verify global variables update instantly.

subparts.description: Map live calculations of Dust Coverage (%) and Solar Panel Efficiency (%) to telemetry cards.
subparts.verification_step: Verify metrics reach 100% efficiency and 0% coverage as dust is cleared.

roadmap.verification_gate: Interactive parameters bind correctly with live metrics and particle kinematics.

subparts.description: Create Web Serial adapter framework to listen for serial data streams.
subparts.verification_step: Confirm receiver adapter contains modular parsing hooks for comma-separated frame tokens.

roadmap.verification_gate: Telemetry receiver parsed logic handles frame synchronization, making it ready to integrate with external MCU hardware.
